scope.summary: Renames the human-facing field-hardening train text from server 0.9.1 to server 0.10.0 while preserving Cargo version metadata and historical bead IDs.
out_of_scope: No Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock, package metadata, or release artifact version changes.
No raw edits to tombstone Beads records; br update refuses tombstones, so historical tombstone text remains immutable tracker history.
No renaming of 091-prefixed bead IDs; only human-facing train text and labels were corrected.

entry_points.name: field-hardening plan train correction
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat b3e4fe8d` showed docs/plan/PLAN_0_9_1_FIELD_HARDENING.md changed only as the v9 correction: server train renamed to 0.10.0 / driver 0.9.0, with no Cargo metadata touched.

entry_points.name: engineering program train correction
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat f346d39c` showed docs/plan/PLAN_ENGINEERING_PROGRAM.md updated for the server 0.10.0 / driver 0.9.0 train correction. The shared C5 janitor hunk was removed before this commit and restored after it, leaving C5 as the only remaining worktree diff in that file.

entry_points.name: tracker export train correction
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat 38356a4d` showed .beads/issues.jsonl changed by 6 insertions / 6 deletions for mutable bead train text and labels. `br show oraclemcp-788nn --json` reports title 'Rename release-train text to 0.10.0 across plan, beads and tracker root' and label 'train-0100'.

entry_points.name: mutable tracker old-train scan
entry_points.trace: `br list --all --deferred --limit 0 --json` scanned 1265 issues across title, description, notes, design, and acceptance_criteria. The only remaining mutable-field hit for 0.9.1/train-091 is oraclemcp-788nn.description, where the text intentionally explains why 0.9.1 was the wrong train name; train-091 count was 0.

entry_points.name: plan residual old-train scan
entry_points.trace: `rg -n '0\.9\.1|0\.8\.5|train-091' docs/plan/PLAN_0_9_1_FIELD_HARDENING.md docs/plan/PLAN_ENGINEERING_PROGRAM.md` found only three intentional references in PLAN_0_9_1_FIELD_HARDENING.md: the superseded operator decision and the v9 correction explaining 0.9.1 -> 0.10.0.

entry_points.name: close scaffold scope cleanliness
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/audit_bead_closes.py --template oraclemcp-788nn --scope docs/plan/PLAN_0_9_1_FIELD_HARDENING.md --scope docs/plan/PLAN_ENGINEERING_PROGRAM.md --scope .beads/issues.jsonl` reported source sha f346d39c2474243dd198f022c8afff17c1975fbe with tree_clean true for the claimed scope.

limitations: Documentation/tracker-only correction; no cargo build or test was run because no Rust source or package metadata changed.

The shared checkout still contains unrelated live peer work outside this bead, including C5 janitor hunks in docs/plan/PLAN_ENGINEERING_PROGRAM.md after the 788nn commit. Those hunks are deliberately excluded from this close evidence.
